__scanner_result_dec_normal__: All these file changes were previously marked as ignored. You can review them and decide whether to keep them on the ignore list.
__scanner_desc__: You can scan your site to detect unauthorized changes in WordPress core files. After scanning, FluentAuth will display any security issues found.
__email_default_system_desc__: This email will use the system default content. If you want to customize the email subject and body, please switch to Customized Content.
__free_api_desc__: Please fill in the form to get a free API key that enables Security Scan and automated notifications. This API key is used to send you emails from the FluentAuth Service. (You only need the free API key once.)
__wp_config_instruction__: Please add the following code to your wp-config.php file (replace the *** with your app values).
__file_change_detected__: It looks like some file changes have been detected. Please review the individual files and take the necessary actions.
__server_mode_desc__: You can use this site as the main Register/Login provider for your child sites. Please read %s for the full documentation.
__fluentsmtp_promo_desc__: Stop losing emails to spam or undelivered inboxes. FluentSMTP connects WordPress to your favorite email service (Gmail, Outlook, Amazon SES, SendGrid, Mailgun, etc.) in just 60 seconds — no more headaches with wp_mail().
__last_scan_warning__: Your last scan found some file changes %s ago. Please run a check now to view the unauthorized changes.
__api_key_form_consent__: Provide a valid email to receive your free API key and security notifications. By submitting, you agree to our %s. Your email will only be used for API key generation and security updates.
__api_key_email_sent__: We just sent you an email with the API key. Please check your email (%s) inbox and provide the API key.
__api_key_spam_check__: You should receive the API key in your email. If you don't see it, please check your spam folder. If you still don't see it, please
__autoscan_promo__: Enable auto-scanning of your WordPress core files and get email alerts if any unauthorized file changes are detected.
__autoscan_active_desc__: You will receive email alerts whenever any unauthorized file changes are detected.
__login_try_limit_desc__: If a user fails to log in %1s times within %2s minutes, the system will block the user for %3s minutes.
